name: delete-second-confirmation
title: brainstorm: 删除操作二次确认弹窗
description: Align delete confirmation behavior: project deletions keep double confirmation, all other delete paths use single confirmation. Reference-check gates (codelist/unit) remain before confirmation dialog.
creator: decade
notes: Final behavior: project delete flows use double confirmation via confirmFinalProjectDelete; all other delete flows use single ElMessageBox.confirm; codelist/unit deletes have reference-check gate before confirmation dialog.
